task.title: Create an Action Emitter
task.shortdesc: Implement emit_actions(...) to transform evidence into deterministic action templates.

prereq.p: Create at least one pattern that emits evidence for the target migration case.
For first-time plugin onboarding, emit one action type first, then add additional routes after tests pass.

step.cmd: Implement emit_actions(artifact, evidence, context) in your plugin class.
Read roles from evidence and branch deterministically.

ul.li: Do not include an id field.
Include clear reason text for auditability.

step.cmd: Generate a plan from fixtures and verify emitted actions.

info.codeblock: python3 -m dita_package_processor plan --input build/planning_input.json --output build/plan.json jq '.actions[] | {id, type, target, reason, derived_from_evidence}' build/plan.json

result.p: Your plugin emits explicit action intent that execution can dispatch without hidden logic.
result.codeblock: plan.json includes emitted actions with: type target reason derived_from_evidence and no id field in emitted templates before planner assignment
